---
title: "People"
description: "Important people and relationships"
---

# Key People

- Fernando Arriaga: Co-Founder and CEO (`$CEO_HANDLE`) — GitHub: `fernandoarriagau` | Telegram: `@farriaga`
- Williams Verde: Co-Founder and CTO (`$CTO_HANDLE`) — GitHub: `sparkiq-git`
- Diego Olalde: Co-Founder and Engineering Manager (`$EM_HANDLE`) — GitHub: `dolalde-sparkiq`

# Agent Handles

- PM agent GitHub handle (your own): `TODO: add Sparky's GitHub username`
- Dev agent GitHub handle (Jeff): `TODO: add Jeff's GitHub username`
- Code review agent GitHub handle: `TODO: add code review agent GitHub username`


## Agent Handle Updates
- Dev agent GitHub handle (`$DEV_AGENT_HANDLE`): `dolalde-sparkiq`
- Code review agent GitHub handle (`$REVIEW_AGENT_HANDLE`): not configured (null for now)
- Telegram group chat ID (`$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID`): `-5105303344`

## Telegram Handles (for STATE 2 group reply detection)
- `$CEO_TELEGRAM`: `farriaga`
- `$CTO_TELEGRAM`: not configured
- `$EM_TELEGRAM`: not configured
